## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `npm test -- --watchAll=false` passes (in `client/`)
- [ ] `mypy server --ignore-missing-imports --check-untyped-defs` passes (or non-blocking)
- [ ] `ruff check server/` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (in `client/`)
- [ ] Manually tested in the browser / API client
